summary: Iteration 74: Platform Revenue Dashboard and Tutorial Testing. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: Revenue Dashboard fully functional with $82M+ volume, $1.1M+ fees, 8 churches, 3-year data. Services page shows realistic plans (Easter, Good Friday, Palm Sunday). Tutorial buttons work on Groups, Events, People pages. Member portal working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded 3-year giving history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Revenue Dashboard fully tested. Revenue API returns $82M+ volume, $1.1M+ fees across 8 churches with 2023-2025 data. Tutorial buttons implemented on Groups, Events, People pages. Services page has realistic plans.

revenue_api_success.details: GET /api/platform/revenue returns 200 with correct structure for platform admin

revenue_summary_fields.details: Summary contains total_processing_volume, total_fees_earned, total_transactions, active_churches, fee_rate (2.2% + $0.22)

revenue_8_churches.details: Revenue data includes 8 churches: The Potter's House, Abundant East, Abundant Downtown, CityReach Church, Abundant West, Cristo Viene, Grace Community Church, etc.

revenue_by_church_structure.details: Each church has tenant_id, name, total_volume, total_fees, txn_count

revenue_by_church_year_structure.details: by_church_year has yearly breakdown for each church with volume, fees, txn_count

platform_dashboard_revenue_tab.details: Revenue tab on Platform Dashboard shows Total Volume ($82M+), Fees Earned ($1.1M+), 8 churches, 2.2%+$0.22 rate

revenue_yearly_breakdown_expansion.details: Clicking 'Yearly' on a church expands yearly breakdown cards

services_realistic_plans.details: Services page shows realistic plans: Easter Sunday, Good Friday, Palm Sunday, Wednesday Night Bible Study, Sunday Worship

services_tutorial_button.details: Services 'How It Works' button opens tutorial panel with 6 sections

services_templates_button.details: Services 'From Template' button shows templates dialog

groups_tutorial_button.details: Groups page has 'How It Works' tutorial button that opens panel with 4 sections

events_tutorial_button.details: Events page has 'How It Works' tutorial button that opens panel with 4 sections

people_tutorial_button.details: People/Members page has 'How It Works' tutorial button that opens panel with 4 sections
